fields.description: The package registry. Use 'npm' for JavaScript, 'PyPI' for Python, 'composer' for PHP.

fields.description: 2-sentence factual summary of the security event.

fields.name: company_labels
fields.default: Field(description="Canonical organisation names only. Use full official names: 'Microsoft', 'Amazon Web Services', 'Google', 'GitHub'. No abbreviations like 'AWS' or 'GCP' standalone. No registry names like 'npm' or 'PyPI' here.")
fields.description: Canonical organisation names only. Use full official names: 'Microsoft', 'Amazon Web Services', 'Google', 'GitHub'. No abbreviations like 'AWS' or 'GCP' standalone. No registry names like 'npm' or 'PyPI' here.

fields.name: sector_labels
fields.default: Field(description="Short, consistent sector names in title case. Use these standard terms where applicable: 'Software Development', 'Open Source', 'Cloud Computing', 'DevOps / CI-CD', 'Cybersecurity', 'Artificial Intelligence', 'Enterprise Software'. Avoid long descriptive phrases.")
fields.description: Short, consistent sector names in title case. Use these standard terms where applicable: 'Software Development', 'Open Source', 'Cloud Computing', 'DevOps / CI-CD', 'Cybersecurity', 'Artificial Intelligence', 'Enterprise Software'. Avoid long descriptive phrases.

fields.default: Field(description="Only concrete package names actually mentioned in the article. No namespace wildcards like '@antv/*'. One entry per distinct package.")
fields.description: Only concrete package names actually mentioned in the article. No namespace wildcards like '@antv/*'. One entry per distinct package.

fields.description: Named threat group exactly as identified in the article e.g. 'TeamPCP'. Null if unknown or not attributed.

fields.description: Exploitation status of the vulnerability: poc_available, actively_exploited, patched, or unpatched. Null if not determinable.

fields.description: Severity level: critical, high, medium, or low. Null if not stated.

fields.description: Embedding vector for the article title. Excluded from API serialization.

fields.description: Package name as published on the registry.
